The Residence

A ground-floor residence at Manastiri Bay with its own generous terrace, opening from the living space onto the gardens and the bay beyond. A calm double bedroom and a sheltered loggia complete a home designed for easy coastal living — private beach, piazza and Belvedere Garden just beyond the door, minutes from Ksamil and Butrint.
